FailureImpactDescription: Portal cannot complete login/registration via the Infinity Gate auth handshake
Notes: Verified via runtime code, not just the env var: workers/infinity-portal-service/service.py's call_auth_service() does a real HTTP request to AUTH_SERVICE_URL, invoked from router.py's /portal/login and /portal/register handlers, which pass /auth/login and /auth/register to the upstream Infinity Auth service
